title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Announces Upcoming In-person Shareholder Appreciation Events
summary: Join us for one (or both!) of our Shareholder Appreciation Events this October. One will be held in Anchorage in coordination with the AFN Convention and the other in Nome. Sitnasuak Board Members, Management and Staff will be available to speak to Shareholders about benefits, job opportunities and...
